info.title: Platform Integration and Governance Core API
info.summary: Generated LTI, Security Framework, and Data Privacy API schemas from the structured integration/governance dictionary source.
info.description: This OpenAPI document is generated from dictionary/integration-governance-core.v1.json. It documents planned LTI registration, launch, LTI Advantage service, OAuth client, scope policy, privacy sharing, consent, retention, and audit API schemas. It is not a formal LTI, Security Framework, or Data Privacy certification claim and is not executable on GitHub Pages until a backend is added.

servers.description: Portal host; integration and governance endpoints are planned documentation until backend runtime exists.

LtiRegistration.description: The security agreement between this platform and one external LTI tool.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this LTI registration.

tenantId.description: The school, district, or customer boundary that owns this registration.

issuer.description: The platform issuer identifier used in LTI launch tokens.

clientId.description: The OAuth client ID assigned to the tool by the platform.

toolName.description: The name administrators and instructors see for the external tool.

initiateLoginUri.description: The tool URL where the platform starts the LTI login flow.

redirectUris.description: The tool URLs that are allowed to receive launch responses.

jwksUri.description: The URL where public signing keys for the tool or platform can be fetched.

authorizationEndpoint.description: The platform URL used during OpenID Connect authentication.

tokenEndpoint.description: The platform URL where the tool asks for service access tokens.

allowedScopes.description: The service permissions the tool may request after policy review.

status.description: Whether this registration can currently be used.

x-valueDescriptions.active: The record is currently allowed for use.
x-valueDescriptions.inactive: The record exists but is not currently usable.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The record is kept for history but should not be used for new activity.

updatedAt.description: When this registration was last changed.

LtiDeployment.description: One installation of an LTI tool for a tenant, school, course, section, or activity.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this deployment.

registrationId.description: The LTI registration that governs this deployment.

deploymentId.description: The immutable deployment identifier sent in LTI launch claims.

deploymentScope.description: The level where this tool installation is available.

x-valueDescriptions.tenant: The deployment applies across the whole school, district, or customer boundary.
x-valueDescriptions.school: The deployment applies to one school or building.
x-valueDescriptions.course: The deployment applies to one course offering.
x-valueDescriptions.section: The deployment applies to one class or section.
x-valueDescriptions.activity: The deployment applies to one resource link or learning activity.

contextId.description: The course, section, school, or tenant context this deployment is attached to.

resourceLinkId.description: The specific course activity link this deployment is tied to when the tool is activity-scoped.

serviceScopes.description: The LTI Advantage scopes enabled for this deployment after tenant policy filtering.

status.description: Whether launches and services for this deployment are enabled.

x-valueDescriptions.active: The record is currently allowed for use.
x-valueDescriptions.inactive: The record exists but is not currently usable.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The record is kept for history but should not be used for new activity.

LtiLaunch.description: One launch attempt from the platform to an external LTI tool.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this launch attempt.

tenantId.description: The tenant boundary that owns the launch event.

registrationId.description: The registration used to validate and route the launch.

deploymentId.description: The LTI deployment identifier included in the launch.

messageType.description: The LTI workflow represented by this launch.

x-valueDescriptions.LtiResourceLinkRequest: A normal launch from a course activity link.
x-valueDescriptions.LtiDeepLinkingRequest: An instructor launch used to select content from a tool.
x-valueDescriptions.LtiDeepLinkingResponse: A tool response returning selected content to the platform.

ltiVersion.description: The LTI version claim supplied in the launch.

x-valueDescriptions.1.3.0: The LTI 1.3 launch message version used by the current model.

subjectId.description: The user identifier from the launch token when the launch is not anonymous.

contextId.description: The course, section, or group where the launch happened.

roles.description: The LTI roles supplied for the launching user.

targetLinkUri.description: The final tool URL that should receive the launch.

nonceHash.description: A stored fingerprint of the one-time launch nonce used to prevent replay.

idTokenHash.description: A fingerprint of the signed launch token kept for audit without exposing the full token everywhere.

rawClaims.description: The original launch claims retained for troubleshooting and conformance review under tenant policy.

validationStatus.description: Whether signature, issuer, audience, deployment, nonce, and time checks passed.

x-valueDescriptions.pending: The payload or workflow has not been fully checked yet.
x-valueDescriptions.valid: The payload or workflow passed platform validation.
x-valueDescriptions.invalid: The payload or workflow failed validation.
x-valueDescriptions.rejected: The platform rejected the payload or workflow under policy.

LtiServiceEndpoint.description: An LTI Advantage service URL that a tool may call for roster, gradebook, or deep-linking workflows.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this LTI service endpoint.

deploymentId.description: The deployment that may expose this service endpoint.

serviceType.description: Which LTI Advantage service this endpoint supports.

x-valueDescriptions.nrps: The service that returns course or context memberships.
x-valueDescriptions.ags_line_items: The service surface for gradebook columns.
x-valueDescriptions.ags_scores: The service surface for sending score updates.
x-valueDescriptions.ags_results: The service surface for reading stored grade results.
x-valueDescriptions.deep_linking: The launch workflow for selecting tool content into a course.

endpointUrl.description: The API URL a tool calls for this service.

serviceVersions.description: The supported service versions advertised to the tool.

requiredScope.description: The OAuth scope required before the tool may call this endpoint.

contextId.description: The class, course, section, or activity context the service is scoped to.

policyStatus.description: Whether tenant privacy and scope policy allows this service to be exposed.

x-valueDescriptions.active: The record is currently allowed for use.
x-valueDescriptions.inactive: The record exists but is not currently usable.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The record is kept for history but should not be used for new activity.

LtiMembership.description: One person returned in an LTI Names and Role Provisioning Service roster response.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this LTI membership projection.

serviceEndpointId.description: The NRPS endpoint that returned or would return this membership.

contextId.description: The course, section, group, or other context represented by the membership.

userId.description: The LTI user ID for the member.

platformPersonId.description: The resolved platform person ID when policy permits resolution.

displayName.description: The member name shared with the tool.

email.description: The member email shared with the tool if policy allows it.

roles.description: The LTI roles this member has in the context.

status.description: Whether the membership is currently active.

x-valueDescriptions.Active: The person is currently active in the context.
x-valueDescriptions.Inactive: The person has a membership but is not currently active.

lisPersonSourcedid.description: A legacy or SIS-linked person identifier shared through LTI when allowed.

LtiGradeExchange.description: A gradebook line item, score, or result exchanged through LTI Assignment and Grade Services.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this AGS exchange record.

serviceEndpointId.description: The AGS endpoint used for this grade exchange.

lineItemUrl.description: The URL or identifier for the gradebook line item.

scoreMaximum.description: The maximum possible score for the line item or score update.

scoreGiven.description: The points or score earned by the learner.

userId.description: The learner who receives the score or result.

activityProgress.description: Where the learner is in the activity lifecycle.

x-valueDescriptions.Initialized: The activity record exists but work has not started.

gradingProgress.description: Where the score is in the grading lifecycle.

x-valueDescriptions.Pending: The grade is not ready yet.
x-valueDescriptions.PendingManual: A person still needs to grade the work.
x-valueDescriptions.NotReady: There is not enough information to grade yet.

timestamp.description: When the tool or platform created this grade exchange event.

exchangeStatus.description: Whether the AGS exchange was accepted, rejected, or held for review.

x-valueDescriptions.pending: The payload or workflow has not been fully checked yet.
x-valueDescriptions.valid: The payload or workflow passed platform validation.
x-valueDescriptions.invalid: The payload or workflow failed validation.
x-valueDescriptions.rejected: The platform rejected the payload or workflow under policy.

LtiDeepLinkItem.description: One content item selected by an instructor from an LTI tool and returned to the platform.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this deep-linked item.

launchId.description: The Deep Linking launch that produced this selected item.

itemType.description: The kind of content the tool returned.

x-valueDescriptions.file: A file selected from the tool.
x-valueDescriptions.html: An HTML snippet selected from the tool.
x-valueDescriptions.ltiResourceLink: A launchable LTI activity returned by the tool.
x-valueDescriptions.image: An image resource selected from the tool.

title.description: The title shown for the selected content item.

url.description: The content or tool URL returned by the tool.

html.description: An HTML snippet returned by the tool when the item is embedded content.

documentTarget.description: How the platform should display the selected item.

x-valueDescriptions.iframe: Display the item in an embedded frame.
x-valueDescriptions.window: Open the item in a new browser window or tab.
x-valueDescriptions.embed: Place the item directly in page content.

lineItemJson.description: Gradebook line item details returned with the selected item.

availabilityStartAt.description: When the item becomes available to learners.

submissionEndAt.description: When learner submissions for the item are due or closed.

SecurityOauthClient.description: An OAuth client record used for LTI tools or other API integrations.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this OAuth client.

tenantId.description: The tenant that owns or authorizes this client.

clientName.description: The name shown to administrators when reviewing the client.

jwksUri.description: The URL where the client's public keys can be fetched.

publicJwk.description: A stored public key used to verify client assertions when a JWKS URL is not used.

authMethod.description: How the client proves its identity to the token endpoint.

x-valueDescriptions.private_key_jwt: The client signs a JWT with its private key to authenticate.
x-valueDescriptions.client_secret_basic: The client authenticates with a shared secret using basic authentication.
x-valueDescriptions.client_secret_post: The client authenticates with a shared secret in the token request body.

grantTypes.description: The OAuth grant types this client is allowed to use.

allowedScopes.description: The scopes this client may request after tenant and privacy policy are applied.

status.description: Whether tokens may currently be issued for this client.

x-valueDescriptions.suspended: Token issuance is paused for this client.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The client is retained for history but should not receive new tokens.

SecurityScopePolicy.description: A rule mapping an OAuth scope to the API resources, actions, roles, and privacy classes it may access.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this scope policy.

scope.description: The OAuth scope controlled by this rule.

apiResource.description: The endpoint group or dictionary object this scope may access.

allowedAction.description: The operation permitted by this scope.

x-valueDescriptions.read: The scope allows data to be read.
x-valueDescriptions.write: The scope allows data to be created or changed.
x-valueDescriptions.launch: The scope or policy supports launch-bound access.

privacyCeiling.description: The most sensitive privacy class this scope may expose without another policy rule.

x-valueDescriptions.public: Safe to publish without exposing a private learner record.
x-valueDescriptions.directory: Name, email, picture, role, or organization information that schools often share but still control.
x-valueDescriptions.education_record: Enrollment, grade, progress, submission, achievement, or transcript data about a learner.
x-valueDescriptions.sensitive: Data needing extra care, including private identifiers, demographics, accommodations, or security proof material.
x-valueDescriptions.behavioral: Activity or usage data created by using a tool or resource.
x-valueDescriptions.operational: Import, export, launch, validation, or processing data.
x-valueDescriptions.system: Platform configuration, keys, tokens, scopes, secrets metadata, or infrastructure data.
x-valueDescriptions.privacy_governance: Policy and review data used to decide how other data may be shared or retained.

fieldPatterns.description: Optional dictionary field names or patterns allowed by this scope.

requiresLaunchContext.description: Whether access must be tied to a current launch, deployment, class, or activity context.

allowedRoles.description: Roles that may use or benefit from the scope.

policyStatus.description: Whether this scope policy is active, inactive, or retired.

x-valueDescriptions.active: The record is currently allowed for use.
x-valueDescriptions.inactive: The record exists but is not currently usable.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The record is kept for history but should not be used for new activity.

PrivacyDataSharingRule.description: A tenant policy rule explaining what data may be shared, with whom, for what purpose, and under what legal basis.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this data sharing rule.

tenantId.description: The tenant whose policy this rule belongs to.

dataCategory.description: The broad kind of school data governed by the rule.

x-valueDescriptions.roster: People, roles, classes, sections, and memberships.
x-valueDescriptions.gradebook: Line items, scores, results, and grading state.
x-valueDescriptions.assessment: Assessment content, attempts, responses, and outcomes.
x-valueDescriptions.activity: Launches, events, sessions, and tool usage.
x-valueDescriptions.credential: Badges, transcripts, achievements, endorsements, and proofs.
x-valueDescriptions.identifier: IDs and crosswalks that connect people or resources across systems.
x-valueDescriptions.security: Tokens, keys, scopes, client records, and audit evidence.
x-valueDescriptions.raw_payload: Original standards payloads retained for audit or reprocessing.

privacyClass.description: The platform privacy class for the data covered by this rule.

x-valueDescriptions.public: Safe to publish without exposing a private learner record.
x-valueDescriptions.directory: Name, email, picture, role, or organization information that schools often share but still control.
x-valueDescriptions.education_record: Enrollment, grade, progress, submission, achievement, or transcript data about a learner.
x-valueDescriptions.sensitive: Data needing extra care, including private identifiers, demographics, accommodations, or security proof material.
x-valueDescriptions.behavioral: Activity or usage data created by using a tool or resource.
x-valueDescriptions.operational: Import, export, launch, validation, or processing data.
x-valueDescriptions.system: Platform configuration, keys, tokens, scopes, secrets metadata, or infrastructure data.
x-valueDescriptions.privacy_governance: Policy and review data used to decide how other data may be shared or retained.

recipientType.description: Who may receive the data under this rule.

x-valueDescriptions.district_admin: A district administrator or authorized central-office user.
x-valueDescriptions.school_staff: A teacher, counselor, administrator, or staff member.
x-valueDescriptions.learner: The learner whose data is involved.
x-valueDescriptions.guardian: A parent or guardian authorized to view the learner's data.
x-valueDescriptions.service_provider: A vendor or processor acting under agreement.

purpose.description: The educational or operational reason for sharing the data.

legalBasis.description: The legal or policy basis used to justify the data sharing.

x-valueDescriptions.consent: The person or guardian has consented to this sharing.
x-valueDescriptions.contract: The sharing is covered by a contract or service agreement.
x-valueDescriptions.school_official: The recipient acts under school official or equivalent educational interest rules.
x-valueDescriptions.legitimate_interest: The sharing supports an approved operational or educational interest.
x-valueDescriptions.legal_obligation: The sharing is required by law, regulation, or formal process.

fieldPatterns.description: The dictionary fields or field patterns this rule covers.

minimizationNote.description: How the platform limits shared data to what the purpose requires.

status.description: Whether this sharing rule is currently active.

x-valueDescriptions.active: The record is currently allowed for use.
x-valueDescriptions.inactive: The record exists but is not currently usable.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The record is kept for history but should not be used for new activity.

reviewedAt.description: When the rule was last reviewed.

PrivacyConsentRecord.description: A record of learner, guardian, or administrator consent connected to a privacy rule.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this consent record.

tenantId.description: The tenant boundary for this consent record.

personId.description: The learner or user whose data the consent concerns.

guardianPersonId.description: The guardian or authorized person who gave consent when applicable.

ruleId.description: The data sharing rule this consent applies to.

consentStatus.description: Whether consent is granted, denied, revoked, expired, or pending.

x-valueDescriptions.pending: The platform has not received a final consent choice.
x-valueDescriptions.expired: Consent was time-limited and is no longer active.

effectiveAt.description: When the consent state became effective.

expiresAt.description: When the consent state expires if it is time-limited.

sourceMethod.description: How the platform received this consent state.

x-valueDescriptions.admin: An administrator recorded the consent state.
x-valueDescriptions.guardian_portal: A guardian submitted the consent state through a portal.
x-valueDescriptions.learner_portal: A learner submitted the consent state through a portal.
x-valueDescriptions.imported_agreement: The consent state came from an imported agreement or external system.

evidenceUri.description: A reference to the form, agreement, or audit evidence for the consent.

PrivacyRetentionRule.description: A tenant rule for how long a category of data is retained and what happens when it expires.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this retention rule.

tenantId.description: The tenant whose data retention policy this rule belongs to.

sourceStandard.description: The standard or platform area that produces the data.

x-valueDescriptions.lti: Learning Tools Interoperability launch or service data.
x-valueDescriptions.security_framework: OAuth, OIDC, key, token, scope, or service security data.
x-valueDescriptions.data_privacy: Privacy policy, consent, retention, or audit data.
x-valueDescriptions.oneroster: Rostering, gradebook, or related OneRoster data.

dataCategory.description: The category of data controlled by this retention rule.

x-valueDescriptions.roster: People, roles, classes, sections, and memberships.
x-valueDescriptions.gradebook: Line items, scores, results, and grading state.
x-valueDescriptions.assessment: Assessment content, attempts, responses, and outcomes.
x-valueDescriptions.activity: Launches, events, sessions, and tool usage.
x-valueDescriptions.credential: Badges, transcripts, achievements, endorsements, and proofs.
x-valueDescriptions.identifier: IDs and crosswalks that connect people or resources across systems.
x-valueDescriptions.security: Tokens, keys, scopes, client records, and audit evidence.
x-valueDescriptions.raw_payload: Original standards payloads retained for audit or reprocessing.

retentionPeriodDays.description: How many days the data may be retained before the action is due.

actionOnExpiry.description: What the platform should do when data reaches the retention limit.

x-valueDescriptions.delete: Remove the data when the retention limit is reached.
x-valueDescriptions.anonymize: Remove or transform identifiers so the data no longer identifies a learner.
x-valueDescriptions.aggregate_only: Keep only aggregate counts or summaries.
x-valueDescriptions.legal_hold: Retain the data because a legal hold prevents deletion.

rawPayloadPolicy.description: How the platform should retain raw standards payloads after projection.

x-valueDescriptions.retain: Keep the original payload under access controls.
x-valueDescriptions.minimize: Retain only the payload parts needed for audit or reprocessing.
x-valueDescriptions.hash_only: Keep a fingerprint of the payload instead of the full original.
x-valueDescriptions.discard_after_projection: Delete the raw payload after structured fields are projected.

legalHold.description: Whether deletion or anonymization is paused by a legal hold.

status.description: Whether this retention rule is active, inactive, or retired.

x-valueDescriptions.active: The record is currently allowed for use.
x-valueDescriptions.inactive: The record exists but is not currently usable.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The record is kept for history but should not be used for new activity.

PrivacyAuditEvent.description: An audit trail entry for access, sharing, export, deletion, policy changes, consent changes, or token issuance involving governed data.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this audit event.

tenantId.description: The tenant boundary for the audited event.

actorPersonId.description: The person who performed the audited action, if a person was involved.

clientId.description: The OAuth client or tool that performed the audited action, if an integration was involved.

eventType.description: The type of privacy or security event being recorded.

x-valueDescriptions.export: Data was exported outside the platform.
x-valueDescriptions.share: Data was shared with a recipient or tool.
x-valueDescriptions.delete: Data was deleted or scheduled for deletion.
x-valueDescriptions.policy_change: A privacy, scope, or retention policy changed.
x-valueDescriptions.token_issue: A security token was issued or denied.

objectType.description: The dictionary object, endpoint group, or policy area affected by the event.

objectId.description: The specific record affected by the event when one applies.

privacyClass.description: The most sensitive privacy class involved in the event.

x-valueDescriptions.public: Safe to publish without exposing a private learner record.
x-valueDescriptions.directory: Name, email, picture, role, or organization information that schools often share but still control.
x-valueDescriptions.education_record: Enrollment, grade, progress, submission, achievement, or transcript data about a learner.
x-valueDescriptions.sensitive: Data needing extra care, including private identifiers, demographics, accommodations, or security proof material.
x-valueDescriptions.behavioral: Activity or usage data created by using a tool or resource.
x-valueDescriptions.operational: Import, export, launch, validation, or processing data.
x-valueDescriptions.system: Platform configuration, keys, tokens, scopes, secrets metadata, or infrastructure data.
x-valueDescriptions.privacy_governance: Policy and review data used to decide how other data may be shared or retained.

policyId.description: The scope, sharing, consent, or retention policy that governed the event.

outcome.description: Whether the action was allowed, denied, failed, or completed.

reason.description: A short explanation for the audit outcome.

x-unsupported-or-deferred.reason: Requires a hosted OAuth/OIDC backend, nonce and state storage, private key management, and tenant deployment records.

x-unsupported-or-deferred.area: Public AGS, NRPS, and Deep Linking runtime
x-unsupported-or-deferred.reason: Requires token issuance, tenant row-level authorization, gradebook write policy, and live service endpoints.
GitHub Pages cannot host token endpoints, client assertion validation, or secret/key storage.
Consent checks, retention jobs, deletion, export, and data-sharing agreements need persistent backend services.
LTI, Security Framework, and Data Privacy certification require conformance testing and organizational review beyond generated dictionary artifacts.
